private.label: Private
private.description: Best for personal workspaces. Resource-level permissions are not strictly enforced by visibility yet.

teamReadonly.label: Team Read-only
teamReadonly.description: Team members can view this project. Write access is still controlled by OWNER and ADMIN roles.

teamEditable.label: Team Editable
teamEditable.description: Best for collaborative projects. Backend write permissions are still determined by workspace member roles.

public.label: Public
public.description: A public-facing project view for sharing context and status.

overview.summary: {total} total projects, {linked} with active issues, {empty} without active issues, {unassigned} active issues without a project
overview.searchPlaceholder: Search by project name, brief, phase, owner, or visibility...
overview.emptyDescription: Try a different keyword, or create a new project.
overview.missingBrief: This project does not have a collaboration brief yet.

attention.overdueDescription: {count} issues are past the due date.
attention.staleSyncDescription: It has been {count} days since the last sync update.
attention.healthyDescription: There are no strong delay or blocker signals right now.

summary.missingIssue: Issue details are still syncing. Please try again in a moment.
summary.docCreateAuthRequired: Current user info is unavailable, so a project doc cannot be created yet.
summary.docCreateFailed: Failed to create a project doc.
summary.missingBrief: This project does not have a one-line brief yet. Add the goal, delivery direction, and success criteria.
summary.recentSyncHint: Update this after a review or async sync checkpoint.
summary.blockedIssuesEmpty: No blocked issues are currently detected.

collaboration.title: Collaboration snapshot
collaboration.subtitle: Keep the project page anchored in the next handoff, key docs, and the workflow runs that are currently moving delivery.
collaboration.pendingEmpty: No review or handoff is waiting on a response right now.
collaboration.docsEmpty: No project docs have been created yet. Capture the first brief, decision, or review note here.
collaboration.workflowRuntimeEmpty: No workflow run is active in this project yet.
collaboration.workflowRuntimeSummary: {issueCount} linked issues · {activeCount} active · {waitingReviewCount} waiting review · {handoffPendingCount} waiting handoff · {blockedCount} blocked

timeline.title: Activity and sync timeline
timeline.subtitle: Keep the latest collaboration moves, issue changes, and sync checkpoints in one place so the project rhythm is easy to read.
timeline.activityCountHint: Includes sync checkpoints and recent collaboration activity.
timeline.empty: This project has not formed a useful activity timeline yet.
timeline.syncDescription: The latest async sync checkpoint has been updated and can serve as the current pace marker.

issues.title: Issues
issues.subtitle: Keep the project execution layer separate, with both list and board views.
issues.onlyCreatorCanCancel: Only the creator can cancel this issue.
issues.cancelled: Issue canceled. It is now hidden in list view by default.
issues.cancelFailed: Failed to cancel the issue. Please try again.
issues.updateStateFailed: Failed to update the issue state. Please try again.
issues.emptyTitle: This project does not have any active issues yet
issues.emptyDescription: List view hides done and canceled issues by default. Switch to board view to see every state.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel this issue?
cancelDialog.description: The issue will be moved to Canceled and hidden in list view by default. The record stays in place and related assignees will still see it.

docs.missingUser: Current user info is unavailable, so project docs cannot be loaded yet.

workflow.title: Workflow
workflow.subtitle: Aggregate the workflows that are actually connected to this project.
workflow.empty: No workflow issue is linked to this project yet. Once a workflow issue is added to this project, it will appear here automatically.

sync.title: Project sync
sync.subtitle: Keep async sync traces and recent changes in a dedicated surface.
sync.empty: Project activity has not built up yet. Issue updates and activity records will accumulate here automatically.

digest.title: Project digest pulse
digest.description: Deliver the latest aggregated doc digests directly into the sync view so you can catch the key collaboration changes before reading the full timeline.
digest.emptyTitle: No digest is ready for this project yet
digest.emptyDescription: When the same project accumulates enough structured doc changes, a digest will show up here first.

timeline.syncDescription: The latest async sync checkpoint has been updated and can serve as the current pace marker.

kanban.dropIssue: Drag an issue into this column

page.selectWorkspaceDescription: Choose a workspace and the project module will automatically scope data to it.
page.loadFailedDescription: We could not fetch the project list.

emptyState.title: No projects yet
emptyState.description: The project module is connected to the live backend now. Create a project container first, then attach related work to it.
emptyState.readOnlyHint: Only OWNER and ADMIN members can create, edit, or delete projects in the current team workspace.

subtitle.create: Turn the project into a collaboration context, not just an issue container.
subtitle.edit: Maintain the brief, phase, risk level, owner, and other collaboration semantics here.

fields.name: Project name
fields.namePlaceholder: For example: Q2 Launch, AI Search Revamp
fields.briefPlaceholder: Explain why this project exists and what the team is moving toward delivery.
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Add scope, success criteria, and key background so the team can understand the project context.
fields.phasePlaceholder: For example: Kickoff, Design Review, Build, Launch

statusDescriptions.planning: The goal and scope are still converging. This is a good time to add the brief and define success criteria.
statusDescriptions.active: The project already has an execution rhythm and can serve as the main collaboration surface.
statusDescriptions.blocked: There is a key blocker, and the team should identify who will unblock it soon.
statusDescriptions.shipping: The work is in release, acceptance, or launch wrap-up.
statusDescriptions.done: The goal has been reached and can stay as historical context.
statusDescriptions.archived: The project has left the day-to-day collaboration flow, but the context should still be kept.

riskDescriptions.low: The rhythm looks stable and no clear handoff or delivery risk has appeared yet.
riskDescriptions.medium: There are already waits or uncertainties worth tracking on the project page.
riskDescriptions.high: Delivery, review, or coordination has a visible risk and needs attention.
riskDescriptions.critical: The project is already being materially affected and needs immediate intervention.

deleteDialog.title: Delete project
deleteDialog.description: Deleting this project will immediately cascade through its related issues, documents, doc folders, and other collaboration context. This action cannot be undone.
deleteDialog.missingProjectDescription: This project does not have a description yet.
deleteDialog.countingIssues: Counting issues that will be cascade deleted...
deleteDialog.countingResources: Counting project resources that will be cascade deleted...
deleteDialog.cascadeWarning: After confirmation, this project's execution surface and document context will disappear together.
deleteDialog.resourceSummary: This will remove {issues} issues, {docs} documents, and {folders} folders together with the project.
deleteDialog.confirmLabel: Enter the project name to confirm deletion
deleteDialog.confirmHint: Deletion is only enabled when the input exactly matches the project name.

toasts.deleted: Project deleted together with {issueCount} issues, {docCount} documents, and {folderCount} folders.
toasts.invalidIssueRoute: The current project route is invalid, so this issue cannot be opened.
toasts.syncFailed: Failed to update the project sync time.
toasts.boardOrderMissingWorkspace: The current workspace is invalid, so the board order cannot be saved.
toasts.boardOrderUnchanged: The board order has not changed.
toasts.boardOrderSaveFailed: Failed to save the board order. Please try again.
